title: Revert the SessionStart hook on opensubagents outcomes
question: Does opensubagents outcomes pull 5 revert the blocking SessionStart hook introduced in pull 4 so that fresh sessions on this repo do not block waiting for apt or dockerd or other service health checks?
success_criteria: SessionStart hook commits from outcomes pull 4 reverted to a state where no apt or dockerd wait runs on session start
Claude Code session-start latency measured at under 100 milliseconds on a freshly cloned outcomes worktree
outcomes main HEAD no longer contains the blocking hook

capabilities: no apt or dockerd wait in outcomes main
